intro: Every default value in NekoServe comes from somewhere. Below are all the cited works with DOIs, APA formatting, and BibTeX entries. When writing the thesis, just grab the whole block.
downloadAllBibtexHint: Download every citation as a single BibTeX file. Paste into your LaTeX project's bib directory and cite via \cite{hirsch2025cats} etc.
noParamLink: Not referenced by any parameter (supporting literature only)
